name: oss
description: Open Science Skills (oss) — 23 Claude Code skills for experimental social science and computational text analysis: conjoint design, diagnostics, and data cleaning, survey design, list experiments, cross-national design, topic modeling, LLM text classification, VLM-based OCR pipelines, post-OCR cleanup, FAIR manuscript checks, citation checking, literature review evidence mapping, figure design, table design, figure/table auditing, paper pre-submission review, hypothesis building, narrative building, pre-registration, methods reporting, presubmit activation, and third-party journal review. Invoke as /oss:skill-name (or just /skill-name when there is no ambiguity) or let Claude auto-trigger based on context.
